steps.title: Identify what accomplishes the goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize the variety of soundscapes. To do this, the answer must show multiple different types of sounds, not focus on a single soundscape.

steps.title: Test each choice against this standard
steps.content: D uses “a range of different soundscapes” with three specific examples (cicadas, birds, water). Choices A, B, and C each feature only a single soundscape. That matches choice D — D is correct.
